title: dryopteris wallichiana subsp. coriacea
intro: Dryopteris wallichiana subsp. coriacea, also known as the Himalayan shield fern, is a subspecies of fern native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris wallichiana subsp. coriacea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support overall well-being. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or powder for various medicinal applications.
